source_jobs.title: [Croatian] - Voice Recording Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Join our team as an Independent Contractor for Project Morava.
 
 
Project Morava aims to help build more natural and intelligent voice AI systems by collecting high-quality speech data from native speakers.
 
 
In this project, participants contribute by reading and recording short, scripted prompts in Croatian. These recordings are used to train and evaluate speech recognition models, enabling voice assistants and AI systems to better understand and respond to real-world users.
 
 
Project Benefits
- The entire task takes approximately 2 hours, including time to review the guidelines
- Work on your own schedule
- Participate from anywhere within Croatia
- Record scripted prompts on your smartphone using the Appen Mobile app
 
 
Task Summary
You will use the Appen Mobile app on your smartphone to record 150 short, scripted voice prompts in Language. Each prompt is a brief spoken command — natural, everyday language. Simply read each prompt clearly and naturally, and you're done.
 
 
Requirements
- Must be a Native speaker of Croatian
- Must be currently residing in Croatia
- Must be 18 years old or above
- Must have a smartphone compatible with the Appen Mobile app
 
 
Payment
Get paid for just 2 hours of work — completed entirely on your smartphone, on your own schedule. Payment is issued upon completion of a full session of 150 prompts. The quality bar is simple to hit: just follow the recording guidelines, speak clearly and naturally, and you're good to go. If assigned fewer than 150 prompts, payment is adjusted proportionally.
 
 
Please Note
This project follows a first-come, first-served approach and operates with demographic quotas to ensure fair and balanced representation across all participant groups. As a result, some individuals may not receive a task assignment if their group has already been filled.
 
 
This role is a project-based opportunity with CrowdGen, where you will join the CrowdGen Community as an Independent Contractor. If selected, you will receive an email from CrowdGen regarding the creation of an account using your application email address. You will need to log in to this account and reset the password, complete the setup requirements, and proceed with your application for this project-based role.
 
 
Join us in shaping the future of voice AI. Your participation in Project Morava will directly help improve how technology understands and responds to real human speech.

In this project, participants contribute by reading and recording short, scripted prompts in Russian. These recordings are used to train and evaluate speech recognition models, enabling voice assistants and AI systems to better understand and respond to real-world users.
 
Project Benefits
- The entire task takes approximately 2 hours, including time to review the guidelines
- Work on your own schedule
- Participate from anywhere within United States
- Record scripted prompts on your smartphone using the Appen Mobile app
 
Task Summary
You will use the Appen Mobile app on your smartphone to record 150 short, scripted voice prompts in Language. Each prompt is a brief spoken command — natural, everyday language. Simply read each prompt clearly and naturally, and you're done.
 
Requirements
- Must be a Native speaker of Russsian
- Must be currently residing in United States
- Must be 18 years old or above
- Must have a smartphone compatible with the Appen Mobile app
 
Payment
Get paid for just 2 hours of work — completed entirely on your smartphone, on your own schedule. Payment is issued upon completion of a full session of 150 prompts. The quality bar is simple to hit: just follow the recording guidelines, speak clearly and naturally, and you're good to go. If assigned fewer than 150 prompts, payment is adjusted proportionally.
 
Please Note
This project follows a first-come, first-served approach and operates with demographic quotas to ensure fair and balanced representation across all participant groups. As a result, some individuals may not receive a task assignment if their group has already been filled.
 
This role is a project-based opportunity with CrowdGen, where you will join the CrowdGen Community as an Independent Contractor. If selected, you will receive an email from CrowdGen regarding the creation of an account using your application email address. You will need to log in to this account and reset the password, complete the setup requirements, and proceed with your application for this project-based role.
 
Join us in shaping the future of voice AI. Your participation in Project Morava will directly help improve how technology understands and responds to real human speech.

source_jobs.title: AI Speech Data Collector; English (Australia)
source_jobs.description:
Join the Appen team as an Independent Contractor for Project Madara.
 
Project Madara is seeking native English speakers for a short, one-time task focused on collecting speech data to improve AI voice and speech recognition systems. In this project, participants will read and record short sentences at different speaking volumes — normal, soft, and whisper — using the Appen Mobile app on their smartphone.
 
Help shape the future of AI-powered speech technology by contributing your voice to build more accurate and natural-sounding systems.
 
Key Responsibilities:
- Read and record short sentences in English at varying volume levels (normal, soft, and whisper)
- Complete all recordings within a single session
- Follow project guidelines to ensure recordings meet quality standards
 
Key Requirements:
- Must be a native English speaker residing in Australia
- Must be 18 years of age or older
- Must have a smartphone compatible with the Appen Mobile app
- Access to a stable internet connection
 
This role is a project-based opportunity with CrowdGen, where you will join the CrowdGen Community as an Independent Contractor. If selected, you will receive an email from CrowdGen regarding the creation of an account using your application email address. You will need to log in to this account and reset the password, complete the setup requirements, and proceed with your application for this project-based role.
 
If you enjoy quick, flexible tasks and want to contribute to cutting-edge AI speech technology, this is your chance!
 
Slots are limited — apply through CrowdGen and start recording!
 
#crowdgen

source_jobs.title: Computer Voice Rating Task for Dutch (Netherlands)
source_jobs.description:
Get Paid to Rate (Language) Audio Clips — Top Contributors Earned $2,000 Last Month! 
Help improve the quality of speech technology by participating in an exciting audio evaluation project. Listen to short Dutch (Netherlands) text-to-speech clips, share your opinion on how natural and pleasant each voice sounds, and get paid for your time. 
Why Join? 
Work from the comfort of your home. 
Flexible, task-based opportunity — work as much or as little as you like. 
Simple opinion-based tasks—no prior experience required. 
One of our top contributors earned $2,000 last month — earning potential grows with task volume and complexity. 
Payment varies per task based on complexity — more involved tasks pay more. 
Receive project invitations via email whenever new tasks become available. 
First-come, first-served task availability. 
What You'll Do  
You'll listen to a series of audio clips spoken in (Language) and rate each clip based on specific quality questions. 
Your role is to: 
Listen carefully to each audio sample. 
Rate the voice according to the task instructions. 
Complete tasks using the ADAP platform. 
Most tasks can be completed within 2–3 days after they become available. 
Project Requirements 
Native speaker of (Language) 
Any residing country  
Access to a computer with Google Chrome or Mozilla Firefox (mobile devices are not supported). 
Reliable internet connection. 
Payment Details 
Compensation varies by task, based on complexity and scope. 
Top contributors completing high volumes of tasks have earned up to $2,000 in a single month. 
Exact pay rates are shared in the project kickoff email whenever a new task becomes available. 
 
Disclaimer: Please disregard the $1/task placeholder that is currently against the project. 
 
Important Note  
This is an ongoing project, so there's always potential for new task opportunities as they open up! Invitations go out based on client needs and demographic requirements — so by applying, you're putting yourself in line for upcoming tasks as soon as they match your profile. Keep an eye on your inbox: eligible contributors get notified the moment work becomes available. The more tasks you take on, the more you can earn, with top contributors seeing the highest payouts. 
This is a project-based opportunity with CrowdGen, where you will participate as an Independent Contractor. If selected, you will receive instructions to access the project and begin completing available tasks. 
Earnings example reflects one contributor's results in a single month and is not typical. Actual earnings depend on task availability, volume completed, and task complexity, and are not guaranteed. 
#CrowdGen

source_jobs.title: EGO Embodied Data Collector Short-Term Project Contractor | Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
source_jobs.description:
📍 Location Between Bukit Jalil and Puchong, near Bandar Kinrara — within short driving distance to Bukit Jalil City and Puchong town centre. The exact site address will be shared once you are selected.
📅 Project Dates: 9 June – 12 June 2026 
🕘 Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM daily 
💵 Compensation: USD 3.60 per hour 
📋 Engagement Type: Onsite Project Contractor

🌟 About the Project
We are on a mission to collect real-world behavioral data to train the next generation of AI systems and robots. You will perform everyday household activities while wearing a lightweight camera device that captures movement, vision, and position data from a first-person view -  helping AI better understand human environments and behaviors.

✅ What You Will Do
✔ Perform daily household activities (e.g., walking, picking up objects, operating equipment, exploring environments) following the project team's instructions 
✔ Wear a camera recording device throughout the session 
✔ Carry out actions in a consistent, standardized way 
✔ Review your recorded footage and flag any blurry or invalid clips 
✔ Help ensure all data meets quality standards before submission

🙋 Who We Are Looking For
✔ Detail-oriented and able to follow instructions carefully 
✔ Comfortable with hands-on, physical tasks throughout the day 
✔ Good observation skills and ability to perform actions consistently 
✔ No experience needed — the role is easy to learn! 
✔ Open to all backgrounds — everyone is welcome to apply

📌 What to Expect
✔ Full-day onsite sessions, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM 
✔ The project team will guide you throughout the entire process 
✔ The recording device will be provided to you on-site on the day of the session 


⚠️ Important Notes
✔ This is a short-term contractor role, not a permanent position 
✔ Contributors are responsible for their own transportation to the site 
✔ The exact site address will be shared once you are selected

📩 How to Apply
Apply through this posting and our team will be in touch within 2–3 business days. As the project kicks off on 9 June 2026, we encourage you to apply early!

source_jobs.title: Egyptian Arabic Voice Recording – Scripted Commands Egypt AI Trainers
source_jobs.description:
What is this job? You will record short, scripted voice commands in your native language (Egyptian Arabic). This data helps train AI systems to better understand natural, native speech.
What you'll do
Review the provided recording guidelines
Record a set of short, scripted voice commands using the Appen Mobile app
Complete a full session of 500 prompts
Ensure at least 90% of your recorded prompts meet the quality standard
Who we're looking for
Native speaker of Egyptian Arabic
Currently residing in Egypt
18 years of age or older
Owns a smartphone compatible with the Appen Mobile app
Work setup
100% remote
Flexible schedule
Estimated time to complete: approximately 1 to 2 hours, including guideline review
Pay
$25 for full completion of a recording session (500 prompts) with at least 90% of prompts quality-accepted
Incomplete sessions will not be compensated
Sessions with a QA score below 90% are considered rejected and will not be compensated
Note This project follows a first-come, first-served approach and operates with demographic quotas to ensure fair and balanced representation across all participant groups. As a result, some individuals may not receive a task assignment if their group has already been filled. This helps us maintain diversity and avoid over-representation. Thank you!
If you're a native Egyptian Arabic speaker looking to contribute to AI voice technology - we'd love to have you on board!

source_jobs.title: Join the CrowdGen Team — Arabic Voice Recording Project
source_jobs.description:
Join the CrowdGen team as an Independent Contractor and take part in our project, a short voice recording challenge designed to help improve speech recognition technology.
 
In this activity, participants will read and record short, scripted commands written in their native Arabic language using the Appen Mobile App. It's a simple, guided activity that can be completed entirely on your smartphone.
 
Most participants complete the full recording session in approximately 1 to 2 hours, including time to review the provided guidelines.
 
Why Join?
 
Take part in a real AI project helping improve Arabic speech technology
Complete a short voice recording challenge using your smartphone
Flexible and easy to complete from home
 
Requirements
-Must be a native speaker of Arabic MSA or Arabic Gulf
-Must be residing in Saudi Arabia, Qatar, or the UAE, and your CrowdGen account must be registered to one of these countries
-18 years old or above
-Smartphone compatible with the Appen Mobile App (Android or iPhone) with a working microphone
-Quiet environment with minimal background noise
-Stable internet connection for uploading recordings
-Ability to follow recording instructions carefully
 
 
Payment Details
-Earn a set rate upon full completion of a recording session (500 prompts) with at least 90% of recordings passing quality review
-If assigned fewer than 500 prompts, payment will be proportional — but the 90% quality threshold still applies
-Incomplete sessions will not be compensated
-Sessions with a QA score below 90% are considered rejected and will not be compensated
 
How to Get Started
Getting started is quick and straightforward:
 
-Apply to the project
-Review and complete the consent form
-Complete the demographic survey
-Verify your identity
-Start recording through the Appen Mobile App
 
 
Important Notes
 
Participation works on a first-come, first-served basis — applying early increases your chances of securing a spot.
 
Demographic quotas apply. If your group is already full, you may not receive a task assignment, but you may be invited to other available projects.
 
 
Ready to Get Started?
 
Take part in this short voice recording challenge and help improve Arabic speech technology used around the world.
 
This role is a project-based opportunity with CrowdGen, where you will join the CrowdGen Community as an Independent Contractor. If selected, you will receive an email from CrowdGen regarding the creation of an account using your application email address.
 
You will need to log in, reset your password, complete the setup requirements, and proceed with your application for this project-based role.
 
Apply now and make your voice part of the future of AI. #crowdgen
